title: aristolochia longa var. multinervis
intro: Aristolochia longa var. multinervis, also known as the Chinese birthwort, is a type of flowering plant in the Aristolochiaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. Its health benefits include treating digestive issues, fever, and certain types of infections, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Aristolochia longa var. multinervis can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
